objectives: Use ten RF Measurement terms accurately.

vocabulary.example: The procedure defines the acceptance criterion for vector network analyzer.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 程序定義了向量網路分析儀的接受準則。

vocabulary.example: The test plan identifies how spectrum analyzer will be controlled and recorded.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 測試計畫說明如何控制並記錄頻譜分析儀。

vocabulary.example: The project team discussed signal generator during the pre-test meeting.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 專案團隊在測試前會議中討論了訊號產生器。

vocabulary.example: The assessor reviewed the traceable evidence supporting power meter.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 評鑑人員審查了支持功率計的可追溯證據。

vocabulary.example: The investigation separated observations about directional coupler from working hypotheses.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 調查將方向耦合器的觀察結果與待驗證假設分開記錄。

vocabulary.example: The engineer explained why calibration plane was relevant to the compliance decision.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 工程師說明了校正平面與符合性判定的關聯。

vocabulary.example: The technician verified reference level before connecting the sample.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 技術員在連接樣品前確認了參考位準。

vocabulary.example: The team evaluated the technical risk related to resolution bandwidth.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 團隊評估了與解析頻寬相關的技術風險。

vocabulary.example: The team reviewed video bandwidth before approving the Day 002 test configuration.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 團隊在核准第 002 天的測試配置前審查了視訊頻寬。

vocabulary.example: The reviewer checked measurement uncertainty against the controlled procedure.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 審查人員依受控程序確認量測不確定度。

common_sentences.english: I will explain how signal generator affects compliance.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我會說明訊號產生器如何影響符合性。

common_sentences.english: Our review found no abnormality in power meter.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我們的審查未發現功率計有異常。

common_sentences.english: Can you confirm the acceptance criterion for directional coupler?
common_sentences.zh_tw: 你可以確認方向耦合器的接受準則嗎？

common_sentences.english: We isolated calibration plane as the dominant factor.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我們已確認校正平面是主要影響因素。

common_sentences.english: The customer requested a concise update on reference level.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 客戶要求提供參考位準的精簡進度說明。

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: I have verified vector network analyzer and recorded the setup.
lines.zh_tw: 我已確認向量網路分析儀並記錄測試設定。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Good. What evidence supports the decision for spectrum analyzer?
lines.zh_tw: 很好。有哪些證據支持對頻譜分析儀的判定？

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: The calibrated result, uncertainty record, and setup photographs are linked in the test log.
lines.zh_tw: 校正後的結果、不確定度紀錄與測試設定照片都已連結於測試日誌。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Please confirm the acceptance criterion before releasing the report.
lines.zh_tw: 發布報告前，請確認接受準則。

debug_case.title: Conducted emission fail — RF Measurement investigation
debug_case.title_zh_tw: 傳導發射超標：射頻量測調查
debug_case.problem: A pre-compliance check on Day 002 shows a repeatable conducted emission fail condition.
debug_case.background: The RF Measurement configuration was documented before the result was compared with the applicable criterion. This is a realistic training scenario; learners must distinguish observations from hypotheses.
possible_causes: The switching supply has inadequate input filtering.
A common-mode return path couples noise to the mains.
check_steps: Compare line and neutral spectra with both detector modes.
Probe the input filter and switching node.
corrective_actions: Optimize the common-mode choke and X/Y capacitors.
debug_case.supervisor_question: How would you prove the root cause before changing the RF Measurement design?
debug_case.suggested_answer: I would first verify the setup and reproduce the result. Then I would isolate one variable at a time, record objective evidence, and repeat the measurement after the corrective action.

interview_question.question: Describe your RF test experience. Connect your answer to RF Measurement.
interview_question.hint_zh_tw: 請說明儀器、標準、測試流程與一項可量化成果。 並連結到「射頻量測」。
interview_question.sample_answer: I plan test configurations, verify instruments, capture traceable results, and investigate abnormal RF behavior. I also explain the technical impact to project teams. In RF Measurement, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
interview_question.natural_rewrite: A natural engineering answer uses a clear context, your specific action, objective evidence, and the resulting technical or business impact.

quiz.prompt: 「vector network analyzer」的正確繁體中文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: vector network analyzer 指的是「向量網路分析儀」。

quiz.prompt: 「頻譜分析儀」的正確工程英文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: 工程文件中可使用 spectrum analyzer。

quiz.prompt: The project team discussed ________ during the pre-test meeting.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 專案團隊在測試前會議中討論了訊號產生器。
quiz.explanation: 完整句子的關鍵詞是 signal generator。

quiz.prompt: 播放語音後，選出你聽到的專業詞彙。
quiz.explanation: 播放內容是 power meter（功率計）。

quiz.prompt: Describe your RF test experience. Connect your answer to RF Measurement.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 請說明儀器、標準、測試流程與一項可量化成果。 並連結到「射頻量測」。
quiz.answer: I plan test configurations, verify instruments, capture traceable results, and investigate abnormal RF behavior. I also explain the technical impact to project teams. In RF Measurement, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
quiz.explanation: 回答應包含具體行動、工程證據與結果；系統採關鍵概念給分。
